titles.title: I Must Have the Saviour With Me

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I must have the Saviour with me, For I dare not walk alone, I must feel His presence near me, And His arm around me thrown.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Then my soul shall fear no ill Let Him lead me where He will I will go without a murmur, And His footsteps follow still.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I must have the Saviour with me, For my faith, at best, is weak; He can whisper words of comfort, That no other voice can speak.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I must have the Saviour with me, In the onward march of life’ Through the tempest and the sunshine, Through the battle and the strife.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I must have the Saviour with me, And His eye the way must guide, Till I reach the vale of Jordan, Till I cross the rolling tide.
